3213560.name: Launch Ball
3213560.description:
LAUNCH BALL Position your cannon and skillfully launch the ball!

  • Designed for puzzle lovers of all levels (even if you're new to physics games);

  • Solve +27 carefully crafted levels to challenge your mind and skills;

  • Enjoy a minimalist and pleasing design, with elegant geometric shapes and soothing colors;

  • Requires patience, strategy, and a bit of luck to overcome the toughest stages;

  • Feedback sounds only for a more immersive experience;

  • Extra levels for highly skilled players looking for an additional challenge;

  • Every aspect of the game has been meticulously created with love and dedication;

Can you adjust the cannon and hit the box in every stage? Test your skills and see how far your precision and strategy can take you!
